verdict: A repetitive and over-complicated Easy chart marred by illegal three-panel inputs and tedious jump patterns.

issues.problem: Illegal three-panel input: The player is required to execute a JUMP LR while holding U from 11.812.
Illegal three-panel input: Tapping L is required while both U and D are held active.
Severe over-reliance on JUMP LR (used nearly 40 times on identical beats), leading to an extremely repetitive and boring play experience.
Too advanced for an Easy difficulty: Tapping three notes (L, R, D) while holding U requires complex single-foot manipulation.
